# Daily Dad Guide: March 28th, 2026

## Today's Tip for Dads

Remember, being a dad is a journey, not a destination. Embrace the chaos, cherish the small moments, and always be present. Today, take five minutes to truly engage with your kids. Put away your phone, get on their level, and just listen or play.

### Dad Joke of the Day

Why don't scientists trust atoms?
Because they make up everything!
